text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Phew!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: How was that, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... That's all you got to say? That means
there's something missing―

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly, all of Tokai Teio's energy drains...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooosh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What the... Whoaaa!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Why am I on the track?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Teiooo! Give it to theeem!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: You rooock, Teiooo! You got this!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh... Are those my... fans?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Ah yes, of course. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, if they're watching me, I better put on a
show for 'em!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Here I go...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I present to you my pride and joy, the Teio Step!

text_block_list.name: Cheers
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thank you all for coming out to... huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What? It was just a dream?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I guess I was dreaming.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But it was so cool! Everyone was cheering me on―

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, right!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I get it now! What I'm missing is encouragement!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! I need you to cheer me on a whole
bunch!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Then, just like in my dream, I'll get a whole bunch
of power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, I cheer on Tokai Teio and she seems
lighter on her feet than usual.
